quiz_opt_identify_why: Ziangah si nungziaa a chuah ti hngalh awk
quiz_opt_any_stops: Buainak a dingthim mi nungzia paoh
ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li: Team ca tial telh... (Phunpar thar caah Shift+Enter)
ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c: Khualtlinhnak, bawmnak asiloah harnak hrim hrim telh... tsd., "Sianginn cu holh lo ven a si" asiloah "Hi cu middle school sianginn a si"
ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun: Adang thawngpang paoh (ngakchia a ba maw, a thingh maw, etc.)...
ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra: Hmanthlak na duhmi caan kha chimchung...
ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a: Sianginn nuncan kha chimchung... tsd., "Nangmah cu Grade 3 sianginn na si, math caan ah na lung a put i na ngai zungzal i na dingthim"...
ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas: tsd. "Token economy nih math cawnpiaknak chungah off-task nungzia a tlawmter dah?"
ph.eg_handwashing_tying_shoes_morning_ro: tsd. Kut silnak, Pheikhawk khihnak, Zinglei nun zungzal
ph.eg_hitting_peers_when_frustrated: tsd. Lungput a thin tikah hawile vuak
ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_: tsd., "Sianginn cu thuneitu nawl a ngaih lo i hruainak a duh lo."
ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad: tsd. "autism a ngeimi sianginn", "ADHD le tlawnh", "sianginn thar"
ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg: Tuah ding nungzia tinhnak chimchung (tsd., "Sianginn nih amah pang i rian a tuah lai mizat 15 chung")
ph.followup_needed_optional: A hnu pelhnak na herh maw? (na duh ahcun)
ph.how_will_progress_be_measured: Tlangtawn ahcun zeitin tah a si lai?
ph.items_separated_by_semicolons: Thil pakhat hnu pakhat semicolon in
ph.nervous_angry_bored_overwhelmed: A tii? A thin? A ngam lo? A tum?
ph.outcome_key_takeaways_optional: A chuahmi / hngalhmi a biapi (na duh ahcun)
ph.rationale_which_antecedent_does_this_: Sullam (zei antecedent ah maw a tuah?)
ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked:
Na tuahning kha ruahnak tha pek...
• Zei a tha dah?
• Zei a si lo le na tuah ding?
• Zei strategy na hmanthlak duh?
ph.type_your_observation_note_or_click_t: Na hmuhnak, ca, asiloah aw thawn caa hman caah mic kha click...
ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a: Hi ah na lehnak tial. A dihlak in tial i professional holh hmang...
ph.what_behavior_will_change: Zei nungzia dah a thlen lai?
ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ: Nangmah asiloah upa nih zei a dang in dah na tuah khawh?
ph.what_environmental_change_will_you_ma: Zei kulhpi thlennak dah na tuah lai?
ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional: Zei nih hitin na ruahnak a chuahter? (na duh ahcun)
ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi: Hitin na ruah hlanah zei dah a cang?
